title: Task Deduplication Engine
summary: Add fuzzy-match dedup check to MC API task creation. Merge duplicates into existing tasks instead of creating new entries.
author: Robin
businessValue: Eliminates task board pollution (200+ phantom QA tasks, 4x duplicate bridge repairs). Reduces coordination overhead.
technicalNotes: ~40 lines in server.js. Use string-similarity for title matching. Add ?force=true bypass.

title: Agent Wake Events (Ops→Main Escalation)
summary: Replace passive flag-and-wait escalation with active one-shot cron wake events from ops agents to main agents.
author: Robin
businessValue: Reduces escalation latency from 48 hours to <5 minutes. Eliminates repeated flagging pattern.
technicalNotes: Ops agents use openclaw cron add with one-shot schedule. Add pendingEscalations to execution-state.json.

title: Dashboard Improvements Tab
summary: New MC dashboard tab displaying structured improvement proposals with status tracking, scoring, and filtering.
author: Robin
businessValue: Makes improvement pipeline visible to Captain. Unified view replaces scattered markdown files.
technicalNotes: New GET /api/improvements endpoint. Card-grid layout matching existing design. ~200 lines HTML/JS, ~60 lines server.js.

title: Shared Memory Search Index
summary: Lightweight TF-IDF search index over shared-memory/ queryable via MC API, enabling cross-agent knowledge retrieval.
author: Robin
businessValue: Agents find relevant knowledge instantly instead of reading entire files. Reduces token waste from data gathering.
technicalNotes: In-memory inverted index, 5-min refresh cycle. ~150 lines server.js. Must respect workspace privacy boundaries.

title: Bridge Health Monitor with Auto-Escalation
summary: Automated monitor tracking cross-agent task dispatches with TTL-based escalation when handoffs stall.
author: Robin
businessValue: Prevents multi-day handoff stalls (Paperclip: 4 days, 3 duplicate tasks). Ensures accountability in cross-agent work.
technicalNotes: New task fields: dispatchedAt, acknowledgedAt. Cron every 30 min. Escalation tiers: 2h/8h/24h/48h. Dashboard widget.

title: Agent Context Budget Dashboard
summary: Real-time context window utilization panel per agent with color-coded alerts when agents approach limits.
author: Robin
businessValue: Visibility into agent degradation. Agents near context limits produce worse output — early detection enables proactive session cycling.
technicalNotes: Extends Model Ops tab. Leverages existing summarizeAgentSessions(). ~80 lines HTML, ~20 lines server.js.

title: Crew Velocity Analytics
summary: Weekly automated velocity digest with per-agent throughput, completion time, bottleneck identification, and trend charts.
author: Robin
businessValue: Data-driven crew optimization. Surfaces bottlenecks (QA overload, relay congestion) before they become critical.
technicalNotes: New /api/velocity endpoint. Weekly cron digest. Chart.js via CDN for dashboard visualization. Uses existing velocity.json.
